content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: low volatility environment (Vol: 20.1%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive), supporting selective risk taking.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND: TUPRS (1W: +12.81% | 1M: +2.74%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +12.53% | 1M: +13.42%) ABOVE TREND; Technology & Telecom RECOVERY: KONTR (1W: +7.83% | 1M: -48.40%) RECOVERY; Transportation ABOVE TREND: THYAO (1W: +5.47% | 1M: +16.84%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Holding & Investment BELOW TREND: KCHOL (1W: -3.93% | 1M: -0.53%) BELOW TREND, SAHOL (1W: -4.00% | 1M: +4.00%) CORRECTION; Retail & Food BELOW TREND: MGROS (1W: -4.91% | 1M: -3.47%) BELOW TREND; Banking showing short-term weakness with corrections.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: +12.81% | 1M: +2.74%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +12.53% | 1M: +13.42%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +12.38% | 1M: +10.67%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +6.83%) ABOVE TREND, KONTR (1W: +7.83% | 1M: -48.40%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
VESTL (1W: -14.46% | 1M: -4.07%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -6.54% | 1M: +11.49%) CORRECTION, AEFES (1W: -5.25% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND, MGROS (1W: -4.91% | 1M: -3.47%) BELOW TREND, TKFEN (1W: -4.88% | 1M: -1.75%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Strong upside momentum: TUPRS (1W: +12.81% | 1M: +2.74%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +12.53% | 1M: +13.42%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +12.38% | 1M: +10.67%) ABOVE TREND; downside momentum: VESTL (1W: -14.46% | 1M: -4.07%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking under short-term pressure: AKBNK (1W: -4.79% | 1M: +13.95%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -2.62% | 1M: +6.96%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -2.38% | 1M: +8.72%) CORRECTION, YKBNK (1W: -6.54% | 1M: +11.49%) CORRECTION; consider trimming near-term exposure until momentum stabilizes.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed industrials: EREGL (1W: +0.78% | 1M: +6.03%) ABOVE TREND and ASELS (1W: +12.38% | 1M: +10.67%) ABOVE TREND lead, while FROTO (1W: -4.04% | 1M: -4.87%) BELOW TREND and VESTL (1W: -14.46% | 1M: -4.07%) BELOW TREND lag—favor selective longs.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy the clear driver: TUPRS (1W: +12.81% | 1M: +2.74%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +12.53% | 1M: +13.42%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +6.83%) ABOVE TREND, while SASA (1W: -4.49% | 1M: -6.02%) BELOW TREND highlights dispersion—rotate into leaders.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on posture: overweight Energy & Chemicals and selective Transportation/Industrial leaders (TUPRS, TRALT, ASELS, THYAO) and underweight volatile laggards (VESTL, FROTO) and beaten-up retailers; trim banking positions until short-term corrections resolve.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TUPRS (1W: +12.81% | 1M: +2.74%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +12.53% | 1M: +13.42%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +12.38% | 1M: +10.67%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: -14.46% | 1M: -4.07%) BELOW TREND, KONTR (1W: +7.83% | 1M: -48.40%) RECOVERY.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals for leadership continuation, Banking for reversal risk vs. profit taking, Heavy Industry for divergence between winners and losers.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction around short-term support and recent highs (hold = sustain risk-on); catalysts: Q2 earnings, FX moves, and global oil price swings will drive Energy names and market breadth.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low volatility RISK-ON regime but with narrow participation (3/8 sectors positive); Energy & Chemicals and select Industrials/Transportation lead while banks and retailers show short-term corrections. Trade selectively: favor high-momentum energy/industrial names and avoid highly volatile laggards until breadth broadens.
